mapper.select: SELECT fli.id as "lineItemId", fli.fulfillment_order_id as "fulfillmentOrderId", fli.order_item_id as "orderItemId", fli.product_id as "productId", fli.variant_id as "variantId", fli.sku as "sku", fli.quantity_ordered as "quantityOrdered", fli.quantity_allocated as "quantityAllocated", fli.quantity_picked as "quantityPicked", fli.quantity_packed as "quantityPacked", fli.quantity_shipped as "quantityShipped", fli.quantity_short as "quantityShort", fli.bin_location as "binLocation", fli.status as "itemStatus", p.name as "productName", p.brand as "brand", p.weight_grams as "weightGrams", oi.unit_price as "unitPrice", oi.total_price as "totalPrice" FROM fulfillment_line_items fli LEFT JOIN products p ON fli.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN order_items oi ON fli.order_item_id = oi.id WHERE fli.fulfillment_order_id = #{fulfillmentOrderId} ORDER BY fli.sku

SELECT im.inventory_item_id as "inventoryItemId", ii.product_id as "productId", ii.variant_id as "variantId", ii.sku as "sku", im.quantity as "quantity", im.type as "movementType", im.reference_id as "referenceId", im.fulfillment_center_id as "fulfillmentCenterId", im.movement_time as "movementTime", im.reason as "reason", ii.supplier_id as "supplierId", p.name as "productName", p.brand as "brand", fc.name as "fulfillmentCenterName", fc.code as "fulfillmentCenterCode", s.business_name as "supplierName", s.state_id as "supplierState" FROM inventory_movements im LEFT JOIN inventory_item ii ON im.inventory_item_id = ii.id LEFT JOIN products p ON ii.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN fulfillment_centers fc ON im.fulfillment_center_id = fc.id LEFT JOIN supplier s ON ii.supplier_id = s.id WHERE im.type = 'INBOUND' AND im.fulfillment_center_id = #{warehouseId} AND ii.supplier_id = #{supplierId} ${orderby} ${pagination}
